_agent_review.notes: Reconciled US Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, Reg FD/selective-disclosure contexts, public SEC/website bait, role mailbox/public helpline bait, identifier-like numeric fragments, and placeholder/test account IDs; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_label_note: US Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered role/legal mailbox bait, public privacy/ethics helplines, generic training-list wording, negated material-adverse-effect wording, Reg FD/10b/Phase shorthand amount bait, placeholder account IDs, entity registry numbers, and public/generic material-event guidance.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

_stage_readiness.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed all jurisdiction generated Stage A tests and approved the sets as ready for Stage B corpus expansion. This is internal/project benchmark readiness, not recall-lock promotion, legal advice, or procurement-grade legal review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: from 2026‑07‑01 through two full trading days after our Q2 release (scheduled 2026‑07‑23, 4:10 p.m. ET)
preliminary net interest margin compression of 18–22 bps QoQ
Phase 2b signal for Trial NL‑P2b‑h3x/0 9 showing 41% ORR vs 28% plan
bank liquidity coverage ratio running above a 110% internal threshold
none of these are in MD&A drafts
if a non‑intentional disclosure occurs, furnish a corrective Form 8‑K under Item 7.01 by the later of 24 hours or the start of the next trading day
Analyst outreach via private chat platforms is prohibited for MNPI
use the webcast and press release for broad, non‑exclusionary distribution
Do not discuss unannounced payor contract renewals, undisclosed credit policy tweaks, or preliminary device adverse‑event rates; these are issuer‑relative material and non‑public
No patient, household, or consumer PII should be included in draft decks
scrub or mask identifiers before circulation
no account numbers in any external channel

must_not_detect.reason: Negated reference; rule excludes labeling negated MAC/MAE mentions.
Role noun/issuer reference; not PII or MNPI by itself.

uncertain.reason: Appears to be a bank account reference but masked; may still be treated as bank_account PII.
Could function as a quasi-identifier or internal patient code, but not clearly mapped to a listed PII rule.
Internal hotline reference; not clearly covered by employee_id, internal_session_id, or customer_account_number rules.
